user_query: How does Audrey help out the animal shelter?

selected_nodes.text: Audrey donates to an animal shelter as a way of combining her passion for making jewelry and making a difference.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes how Audrey donates to an animal shelter, directly addressing her help.

selected_nodes.text: Audrey sells the jewelry she makes and donates a portion of the profits to an animal shelter.

selected_nodes.text: Audrey adapts and continues to find ways to help even if she can't volunteer at the shelter anymore.
